diagrams.title: Waterfall Model
diagrams.description: Linear sequential model showing phases flowing one direction only
elements: Requirements Analysis → System Design → Implementation → Testing → Deployment → Maintenance
diagrams.purpose: Understanding sequential phase progression in traditional software development

diagrams.title: Spiral Model
diagrams.description: Spiral diagram with four quadrants in each cycle
elements: Each spiral expands outward adding more detail
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing iterative nature with risk management in each cycle

diagrams.title: SDLC Phases
diagrams.description: Complete SDLC showing six phases in sequence with feedback loops
elements: Requirements → Design → Coding → Testing → Deployment → Maintenance with arrows showing phase transitions
diagrams.purpose: Understanding complete software development process and dependencies

diagrams.title: V-Model
diagrams.description: V-shaped model showing relationship between development and testing phases
elements: Requirements → Design → Coding on left, Testing phases on right, connecting at implementation
diagrams.purpose: Understanding verification and validation at each development level
